triageNoteFileName.note: Coded filename of the source triage note (e.g. 'NS MDT YU Hsiu Ying'). Segment order convention: [serviceLocation] [pathway] [ptSurname] [ptName]. Used to infer serviceLocation if not explicitly set.

serviceLocation.note: One or more service/site codes. Value from triage note (triage-field-map) takes precedence over admission summary if both present.

serviceAgreementPending.note: True if service agreement is to be signed at first home visit

patientSummary.note: S/ section — brief narrative of patient, living situation, and reason for referral

clinicalBackground.note: B/ section — read in conjunction with triage note

dischargeDate.note: Date patient was discharged from inpatient ward to home

agedCareRegistered.note: Whether patient is registered with My Aged Care

whsIssues.note: Free text if WHS issues identified; null or 'None' otherwise

familyHandoverRequested.note: Family requested phone call before HITH discharge

skinWoundsCheck.note: Status of skin check or instruction for first-visit RN

Plan.note: R/ section — response and follow-up plan

pendingActions.note: Outstanding actions e.g. service agreement, assessments, skin check
